connect.title: Connect your store
connect.subtitle: Connect your seller account so we can compute orders and profit.

hints.credentials: You can find these in the Trendyol seller panel under Account → Integration Info.

errors.INVALID_NAME_TOO_SHORT: Store name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.INVALID_NAME_TOO_LONG: Store name can be at most 80 characters.
errors.INVALID_SUPPLIER_ID_FORMAT: Supplier ID can only contain letters and digits.
errors.INVALID_API_KEY_FORMAT: API Key / Secret format is invalid.
errors.SANDBOX_NOT_ALLOWED: Sandbox environment is not available in this deployment.
errors.PLATFORM_NOT_YET_AVAILABLE: This marketplace is not yet supported.
errors.DUPLICATE_STORE_CONNECTION: This Trendyol account is already connected.
errors.generic: We couldn't connect the store. Please try again.

metadata.title: PazarSync — E-commerce Profitability & Operations
metadata.description: Platform for Turkish marketplace sellers: per-order real profitability, automated settlement reconciliation, and expense management.

orgStoreSwitcher.emptyTitle: You don't belong to an organization yet
orgStoreSwitcher.emptyDescription: Create an organization or join via invitation to start using PazarSync.

toast.storeFlowNotReady: Connect-store flow is not ready yet

hero.subtitle: Connect your Trendyol and Hepsiburada stores. See every order's net profit in seconds — commissions, shipping, platform fees, and VAT broken out cleanly.

profit.title: Real per-order profit
profit.description: Commission, shipping, platform fees, and VAT itemized so you know what each order actually earned in seconds.

reconciliation.title: Automated reconciliation
reconciliation.description: Match payout reports, carrier invoices, and order data to answer the one question that matters: did the marketplace pay correctly?

expenses.title: Expense management
expenses.description: Product costs, ads, packaging — add every operational expense so your profit figure is honest, not optimistic.

errors.otp_expired: The verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.auth-callback-missing-code: The verification link is incomplete. Please use the full link from the email.
errors.generic: We couldn't complete email verification. Please try again.

supabase.userAlreadyExists: This email address is already registered.
supabase.emailNotConfirmed: You haven't verified your email yet. Check your inbox.
supabase.otpExpired: Code expired. Request a new one.
supabase.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait and retry.
supabase.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.body: We've sent you a link to confirm your account. Open your inbox (and spam folder) and click the link to sign in.

verified.title: Your email is verified
verified.body: Your PazarSync account is ready. Taking you to the dashboard.
verified.redirecting: Redirecting to the dashboard in {seconds} seconds…

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address where we'll send the reset link.

sent.title: Email sent
sent.body: We've sent the reset link to your email. Check your inbox (and spam folder).

errors.generic: Couldn't send the email. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a strong password. You'll be signed in automatically.

invalidSession.title: Link invalid or expired
invalidSession.body: Request a new password-reset email and click the link to return to this page.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.generic: Couldn't update the password. Please try again.

signOut.error: Couldn't sign out. Please try again.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

panel.title: Organizations
panel.description: Organizations you are a member of.

create.title: New organization
create.subtitle: Create an organization for your business. You'll connect marketplace stores under this organization.
create.nameHint: This is an internal reference name. You can change it later.

toast.error: Couldn't create the organization. Please try again.

errors.INVALID_NAME_TOO_SHORT: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.INVALID_NAME_TOO_LONG: Name must be at most 80 characters.
errors.INVALID_NAME_NO_ALPHANUMERIC: Name must contain at least one letter or digit.
errors.INVALID_NAME_RESERVED: This name is reserved. Please choose another.
errors.generic: Couldn't create the organization. Please try again.

active.title: Active organization
active.description: The dashboard and data are scoped to this organization.

createOrganization.title: Let's get started
createOrganization.subtitle: Create your first organization to begin using PazarSync. You'll manage marketplace stores, orders, and expenses under this organization.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong.
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try again, or go home.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for may have moved or been deleted.

empty.title: Dashboard content under planning
empty.description: Store summary and period controls are ready in the rail. Detailed reports will populate this area later.

noStoreAccess.title: No store access yet
noStoreAccess.description: You don't have access to any store in this organization. Ask an organization admin to grant you access, or use the switcher on the left to move to another organization.

placeholderPage.description: This page is still under development. It will be active in upcoming updates.

ordersPage.title: Orders
ordersPage.intent: Orders flowing from connected stores. Filter, watch reconciliation state, open the detail for the profit breakdown.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search by order or package number

noStore.title: No store connected yet
noStore.description: Connect a store to start seeing orders.

noOrders.title: No orders yet
noOrders.description: Once the first order syncs from the connected store, it will land here.

storeAccessDialog.title: Store access
storeAccessDialog.noStores: This organization has no stores yet.

errors.CANNOT_DEMOTE_LAST_OWNER: You can't demote the last owner. Promote another member to owner first.

noPermission.title: You can't view this page
noPermission.description: Only an organization owner or admin can see the member list.

error.title: Couldn't load members
error.description: Something went wrong. Please try again.

empty.title: Notification center coming soon
empty.description: Sync events, new order notifications, and alert history will appear here.

MARKETPLACE_AUTH_FAILED.title: Authentication failed
MARKETPLACE_AUTH_FAILED.description: The marketplace rejected your API credentials. Check the keys in your store settings.

MARKETPLACE_ACCESS_DENIED.title: Access denied
MARKETPLACE_ACCESS_DENIED.description: The marketplace blocked your connection. If you're on sandbox, verify IP allowlisting.

MARKETPLACE_UNREACHABLE.title: Marketplace unreachable
MARKETPLACE_UNREACHABLE.description: The marketplace servers are temporarily not responding.

SYNC_IN_PROGRESS.title: Sync already running
SYNC_IN_PROGRESS.description: A sync of this type is already in progress. Wait for it to finish.

RATE_LIMITED.title: Rate limit exceeded
RATE_LIMITED.description: The marketplace received too many requests in a short window. We'll retry shortly.

VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Invalid data
VALIDATION_ERROR.description: The data being synced doesn't match the marketplace's expected shape.

INTERNAL_ERROR.title: Unexpected error
INTERNAL_ERROR.description: Something went wrong. If the issue persists, please contact support.

fallback.title: Unknown error
fallback.description: Something went wrong. If the issue persists, please contact support.

page.title: Products
page.description: Approved products and variants from your store
page.intent: Approved products synced from your Trendyol store

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by product name, model code, stock code, barcode…

noStore.title: Connect a store first
noStore.description: Connect your Trendyol store to see products.

noProducts.title: No products synced yet
noProducts.description: Run the first sync to get started.

empty.missingCostNone: All products have a cost set.
empty.missingVatNone: All products have a VAT rate set.

a11y.viewImage: View product image at full size

missingCostBanner.title: {count} products missing cost — profit cannot be calculated.

desiCell.overrideAria: You set this dimensional weight manually.

errors.INVALID_DIMENSIONAL_WEIGHT_TOO_SMALL: Desi must be greater than zero.

replaceConfirm.title: Replace costs
replaceConfirm.description: This will remove all existing cost profiles from {count} variants and attach only the selected profile. This cannot be undone.

bulkDesi.title: Set dimensional weight
bulkDesi.description: Apply one desi value to all {count} selected variants.
bulkDesi.help: This value overwrites the Trendyol value and is preserved across future syncs.

errors.INVALID_DIMENSIONAL_WEIGHT_TOO_SMALL: Desi must be greater than zero.

page.title: Costs
page.description: Reusable cost profiles attached to product variants.

empty.title: No cost profiles yet
empty.description: Create cost profiles to attach to product variants. Each profile represents a cost type (raw materials, packaging, etc.).

validation.nameTooLong: Cost name must be 100 characters or fewer.
validation.manualFxRateRequired: A rate is required in MANUAL mode.
validation.tryMustUseAuto: TRY currency always uses Auto mode.

createDialog.title: New cost profile
createDialog.description: Create a reusable cost profile you can attach to product variants.

archive.confirmDescription: This cost profile will be archived and can no longer be attached to new variants. Past orders are unaffected. You can restore it at any time.

page.title: Commission Rates
page.intent: Current commission tariff for your Trendyol store

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search category, parent category, or brand…

columns.productCountHint: Number of synced, approved products you have in this category.

commissionRates.autoSwitchedToActive: Switched to 'Only what I sell' — sorted by product count.

noStore.title: No active store
noStore.description: Connect a store to view its commission tariff.

noRates.title: Commission tariff not loaded yet
noRates.description: Rates for this marketplace are not yet imported. The tariff will be available soon.

noMatches.title: No rates match the current filter
noMatches.description: The search or 'Only what I sell' filter narrowed the results. Clear filters to view the full tariff.

settings.title: Shipping Tariff
settings.subtitle: Choose the shipping tariff used to estimate your net profit.
settings.carrierHelp: This carrier must be approved on your Trendyol contract.

ownContract.title: Upload Your Tariff
ownContract.description: You'll soon be able to upload your own shipping tariff via Excel.

tariffTable.title: Current Tariff
tariffTable.subtitle: Your carrier's current desi-based prices and Barem support tiers. Prices exclude VAT.

errors.SHIPPING_CARRIER_REQUIRED_FOR_TRENDYOL_C: A carrier is required when Trendyol Contract is selected.
errors.SHIPPING_CARRIER_PLATFORM_MISMATCH: The selected carrier does not match this store's marketplace.

NO_DESI.title: Desi value missing
NO_DESI.reason: Shipping estimate needs the product's desi / dimensional weight.

NO_CARRIER.title: No default carrier
NO_CARRIER.reason: Your store doesn't have a default shipping carrier configured.

OWN_CONTRACT_EMPTY.title: Awaiting tariff
OWN_CONTRACT_EMPTY.reason: Own contract is selected, but your shipping tariff hasn't been uploaded yet.

DESI_OVERFLOW.title: High desi, out of tariff
DESI_OVERFLOW.reason: This product exceeds the highest desi covered by the selected carrier's tariff.

banner.title: {count} product can't compute estimated profit
banner.breakdown: missing desi ({noDesi}) · no carrier ({noCarrier}) · high desi ({overflow})

orderDetail.intent: Order from {date} — profit breakdown, fee timeline, and return status.

estimatedNetProfit.label: Estimated profit
estimatedNetProfit.hint: Computed deterministically at T+0 from PSF, stoppage, and shipping estimates.

settledNetProfit.label: Settled profit
settledNetProfit.hint: Updated as settlement rows land from Trendyol and reconciliation completes.

margin.label: Net margin
margin.basisSettled: Share of net sale (based on settled profit).
margin.basisEstimated: Share of net sale (based on estimated profit).

descriptions.NOT_SETTLED: Estimated profit was written at T+0. The state will update when the first settlement row arrives.
descriptions.PARTIALLY_SETTLED: Some settlement rows have been processed. Settled profit will be finalized when the PaymentOrder confirms.
descriptions.FULLY_SETTLED: PaymentOrder has confirmed. Settled profit is final.
descriptions.FULLY_SETTLED_WITH_DATE: PaymentOrder confirmed on {date}. Settled profit is final.

vatBreakdown.title: Net & VAT breakdown
vatBreakdown.costSnapshotMissing: Some line items lack a cost profile — profit is approximate.

empty.title: No fee rows yet
empty.description: PSF, stoppage, and shipping estimates will appear here once the order is created.

empty.title: No order items
empty.description: The sync has not pulled line items yet.

empty.title: No return claims on this order
empty.description: Return claims will appear here once they start flowing from Trendyol.

errors.noStoreContext: An active store is required to view order detail.
errors.notFound: Order not found or does not belong to this store.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load the order. Please try again.
